notes: 8 open Repo Assist PRs. New this run: l_strtof has_digits guard fix (PR #120). PR #111 (pending) also touches strtod/strtof infinity endptr - no conflict since that's a different bug. Next: memmove backward-copy word-at-a-time optimization.
